title: [Workflows] Raise external events against Dapr App Ids
body:
## In what area(s)?
/area runtime

## Describe the feature
My system has two workflows, one at API level that validates requests and then queues them based on priority. Then I have another workflow that consumes items based on priority and processes them. I need the processing workflow to be able to send external events to notify the API workflow that a given request had concluded.

At this time, external events can be only raised with workflows running in the same app.

## Release Note
RELEASE NOTE:
**ADD** New feature in Dapr to enable triggering external events across Dapr applications.
